title: Valid Login with correct credentials
preconditions: User has a registered VWO account
steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login
expectedResult: User is redirected to VWO Dashboard successfully

title: Login with invalid password
preconditions: User has a registered VWO account
steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter incorrect password
4. Click Login
expectedResult: Error message displayed: Invalid credentials

title: Login with unregistered email
preconditions: No account exists for the email
steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Enter unregistered email
3. Enter any password
4. Click Login
expectedResult: Error message displayed: Account not found

title: Login with empty email field
steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Leave email field empty
3. Enter password
4. Click Login
expectedResult: Validation error: Email is required

title: Login with empty password field
steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Enter valid email
3. Leave password empty
4. Click Login
expectedResult: Validation error: Password is required

title: Forgot Password flow
steps:
1. Click Forgot Password link
2. Enter registered email
3. Click Submit
4. Check email for reset link
expectedResult: Password reset email is sent with a secure token link

title: Password reset with invalid email
preconditions: User is on forgot password page
steps:
1. Click Forgot Password
2. Enter unregistered email
3. Click Submit
expectedResult: Error message: No account found with this email

title: Remember Me checkbox functionality
steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Check Remember Me
4. Login
5. Close browser
6. Reopen app.vwo.com
expectedResult: User session is preserved; user remains logged in

title: Logout from VWO
steps:
1. Click user profile/avatar
2. Click Logout
expectedResult: User is logged out and redirected to login page; session is invalidated

title: SSO Login integration
preconditions: Enterprise SSO is configured for user organization
steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Click SSO Login option
3. Enter SSO credentials
4. Authenticate via identity provider
expectedResult: User is authenticated via SSO and redirected to VWO Dashboard

title: Multi-Factor Authentication setup
preconditions: User has MFA enabled in settings
steps:
1. Login with valid credentials
2. System prompts for 2FA code
3. Enter valid 2FA code
expectedResult: User is authenticated and redirected to dashboard

title: Login with invalid 2FA code
steps:
1. Login with valid credentials
2. Enter invalid 2FA code
expectedResult: Error: Invalid authentication code; access denied

title: Email format validation on login
steps:
1. Enter invalid email format (e.g., user@)
2. Tab out of email field
expectedResult: Real-time validation error: Please enter a valid email address

title: Password strength indicator on signup
steps:
1. Navigate to signup page
2. Start typing password
3. Observe strength indicator
expectedResult: Password strength indicator shows Weak/Medium/Strong based on complexity

title: Rate limiting on failed login attempts
steps: 1. Enter wrong password 5 times consecutively
expectedResult: Account is temporarily locked; rate limiting message displayed

title: Dashboard loads after login
steps:
1. Login with valid credentials
2. Observe dashboard
expectedResult: Dashboard loads within 2 seconds showing summary widgets and recent activity

title: Navigation sidebar displays all modules
steps: 1. Observe left sidebar navigation
expectedResult: Sidebar shows: A/B Testing, Heatmaps, Session Recordings, Funnels, Personalization, Reports, Settings

title: Switch between Light and Dark mode
steps:
1. Click theme toggle
2. Select Dark Mode
3. Verify UI
4. Switch back to Light Mode
expectedResult: Theme changes successfully; all UI elements render correctly in both modes

title: Responsive layout on tablet
steps:
1. Open app.vwo.com on tablet browser
2. Navigate through modules
expectedResult: Layout adapts responsively; no horizontal scroll; all elements accessible

title: Responsive layout on mobile
steps:
1. Open app.vwo.com on mobile browser
2. Navigate through modules
expectedResult: Mobile-friendly layout with hamburger menu; touch-friendly controls

title: Breadcrumb navigation
preconditions: User is in a nested page
steps:
1. Navigate to A/B Testing > Campaign > Edit
2. Observe breadcrumb
expectedResult: Breadcrumb shows correct path; clicking parent navigates back correctly

title: Dashboard recent activity widget
steps:
1. Login and view dashboard
2. Check recent activity section
expectedResult: Recent campaigns, tests, and changes are displayed in chronological order

title: Quick search from dashboard
steps:
1. Click search bar
2. Type a campaign name
3. Press Enter
expectedResult: Relevant campaigns and tests are shown in search results

title: Keyboard navigation accessibility
steps:
1. Use Tab key to navigate through interactive elements
2. Use Enter to activate buttons
expectedResult: All interactive elements are accessible via keyboard; focus indicators visible

title: Screen reader compatibility
preconditions: User is on dashboard with screen reader
steps:
1. Enable screen reader
2. Navigate through dashboard
expectedResult: ARIA labels are announced correctly; all elements are screen-reader accessible

title: Create new A/B test campaign
preconditions: User is logged in with campaign creation permissions
steps:
1. Navigate to A/B Testing
2. Click Create New Test
3. Enter campaign name
4. Define test URL
5. Save
expectedResult: New A/B test campaign is created and visible in campaigns list

title: Add variation to A/B test
steps:
1. Open existing campaign
2. Click Add Variation
3. Configure variation changes
4. Save
expectedResult: New variation is added to the campaign and displayed in variations list

title: Configure goals for A/B test
preconditions: An A/B test campaign exists with variations
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Navigate to Goals section
3. Add a goal (e.g., Click, Page Visit, Revenue)
4. Save
expectedResult: Goal is configured and associated with the campaign

title: Set traffic split between variations
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Navigate to Traffic Allocation
3. Set split (e.g., 50/50)
4. Save
expectedResult: Traffic is split as configured between variations

title: Start A/B test campaign
preconditions: Campaign has URL, variations, and goals configured
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Click Start
3. Confirm
expectedResult: Campaign status changes to Running; tracking begins

title: Pause running A/B test
steps:
1. Open running campaign
2. Click Pause
3. Confirm
expectedResult: Campaign status changes to Paused; data collection stops

title: Stop and archive A/B test
preconditions: A campaign is running or paused
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Click Stop
3. Confirm
4. Optionally archive
expectedResult: Campaign is stopped and can be archived; historical data preserved

title: Duplicate an existing campaign
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Click Duplicate
3. Modify name
4. Save
expectedResult: A copy of the campaign is created with all settings replicated

title: Delete an A/B test campaign
preconditions: A draft or stopped campaign exists
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm deletion
expectedResult: Campaign is permanently deleted; removed from campaigns list

title: View A/B test results
preconditions: A completed A/B test has collected data
steps:
1. Open completed campaign
2. Navigate to Results tab
expectedResult: Results show conversion rates, statistical significance, and winner declaration

title: Edit variation using Visual Editor
steps:
1. Open campaign variation
2. Launch Visual Editor
3. Make element changes
4. Save
expectedResult: Changes are saved to the variation and reflected in preview

title: Preview A/B test variation
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Click Preview on a variation
expectedResult: Variation preview loads showing the modified page correctly

title: Set audience targeting for campaign
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Navigate to Targeting
3. Set conditions (URL, device, location)
4. Save
expectedResult: Targeting rules are saved and applied to the campaign

title: Schedule A/B test for future date
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Set schedule start date/time
3. Save
expectedResult: Campaign is scheduled and auto-starts at the configured date/time

title: Multi-page A/B test setup
steps:
1. Create campaign
2. Enable Multi-page test
3. Add multiple URLs
4. Configure variations per page
5. Save
expectedResult: Multi-page test is configured; all pages track together as one campaign

title: Create a new heatmap
steps:
1. Navigate to Heatmaps
2. Click Create New
3. Enter target URL
4. Save
expectedResult: Heatmap is created and tracking begins on the target URL

title: View click heatmap data
steps:
1. Open heatmap
2. Select Click Map view
expectedResult: Click heatmap displays with color-coded hotspots showing click density

title: View scroll heatmap data
steps:
1. Open heatmap
2. Select Scroll Map view
expectedResult: Scroll depth visualization shows percentage of users reaching each section

title: View mouse tracking heatmap
steps:
1. Open heatmap
2. Select Mouse Tracking view
expectedResult: Mouse movement overlay shows areas of user attention and hover patterns

title: Create session recording
steps:
1. Navigate to Session Recordings
2. Click Create New
3. Configure target page and sample rate
4. Save
expectedResult: Session recording is activated on the target page

title: Playback session recording
steps:
1. Navigate to Session Recordings list
2. Select a recording
3. Click Play
expectedResult: Session replay shows user interactions including clicks, scrolls, and navigation

title: Filter session recordings by date
steps:
1. Open Session Recordings
2. Apply date range filter
expectedResult: Only recordings within the selected date range are displayed

title: Filter session recordings by device
steps:
1. Open Session Recordings
2. Filter by device type (Desktop/Mobile/Tablet)
expectedResult: Only recordings matching the selected device type are shown

title: Delete a heatmap
steps:
1. Open Heatmaps list
2. Select a heatmap
3. Click Delete
4. Confirm
expectedResult: Heatmap is deleted; tracking stops; data is removed

title: Heatmap data export
steps:
1. Open heatmap with data
2. Click Export
3. Select format
expectedResult: Heatmap data is exported in the selected format (CSV/PDF)

title: Create a new funnel
steps:
1. Navigate to Funnels
2. Click Create New Funnel
3. Add funnel steps (URLs)
4. Save
expectedResult: Funnel is created and begins tracking user progression through steps

title: View funnel conversion rates
steps:
1. Open funnel
2. View conversion visualization
expectedResult: Funnel chart shows drop-off rates between each step with percentages

title: Edit funnel steps
steps:
1. Open funnel
2. Add/remove/reorder steps
3. Save
expectedResult: Funnel steps are updated; tracking reflects new step configuration

title: Create form analytics tracking
steps:
1. Navigate to Form Analytics
2. Click Create New
3. Enter form page URL
4. Save
expectedResult: Form analytics tracking is activated on the specified form

title: View form field interaction data
steps: 1. Open form analytics report
expectedResult: Report shows field-level metrics: time spent, hesitation, drop-off per field

title: Filter funnel data by date range
steps:
1. Open funnel
2. Apply date range filter
expectedResult: Funnel data is filtered to show only the selected date range

title: Compare funnel segments
preconditions: Funnel has data from multiple segments
steps:
1. Open funnel
2. Apply segment comparison
expectedResult: Side-by-side comparison shows conversion differences between segments

title: Delete a funnel
steps:
1. Open Funnels list
2. Select funnel
3. Click Delete
4. Confirm
expectedResult: Funnel is deleted; tracking stops

title: Create personalization campaign
preconditions: User is logged in with permissions
steps:
1. Navigate to Personalization
2. Click Create Campaign
3. Define audience segment
4. Configure personalized content
5. Save
expectedResult: Personalization campaign is created targeting the specified audience

title: Set audience targeting rules
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Navigate to Targeting
3. Add rules (location, device, behavior)
4. Save
expectedResult: Targeting rules are saved and will filter users for personalization

title: Activate personalization campaign
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Click Activate
3. Confirm
expectedResult: Campaign status changes to Active; personalized content serves to matched users

title: Create a feature flag
steps:
1. Navigate to Feature Flags
2. Click Create Flag
3. Enter flag name and key
4. Configure rollout percentage
5. Save
expectedResult: Feature flag is created with specified rollout configuration

title: Toggle feature flag on/off
steps:
1. Open feature flag
2. Toggle Enable/Disable
3. Save
expectedResult: Feature flag state changes; feature availability updates accordingly

title: Set feature flag rollout percentage
steps:
1. Open feature flag
2. Set rollout to 25%
3. Save
expectedResult: Flag is enabled for 25% of users; gradual rollout works correctly

title: Delete personalization campaign
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm
expectedResult: Campaign is deleted; personalized content no longer serves

title: View personalization campaign results
steps:
1. Open campaign
2. Navigate to Results tab
expectedResult: Results show impressions, conversions, and revenue impact of personalization

title: View campaign summary report
steps:
1. Navigate to Reports
2. Select campaign
3. View summary
expectedResult: Summary report shows key metrics: visitors, conversions, revenue, significance

title: Export report as PDF
steps:
1. Open a report
2. Click Export
3. Select PDF format
expectedResult: Report is downloaded as a formatted PDF document

title: Export report as CSV
steps:
1. Open a report
2. Click Export
3. Select CSV format
expectedResult: Report data is downloaded as a CSV file with all metrics

title: Filter report by date range
steps:
1. Open report
2. Apply custom date range filter
expectedResult: Report data is filtered to show only the selected period

title: View real-time analytics
steps:
1. Open running campaign
2. Navigate to Live view
expectedResult: Real-time data shows current visitors, active variations, and live conversions

title: Compare variation performance
preconditions: A/B test has multiple variations with data
steps:
1. Open campaign report
2. View variation comparison
expectedResult: Comparison chart shows performance metrics side-by-side for all variations

title: Statistical significance indicator
steps:
1. Open campaign report
2. Check significance indicator
expectedResult: Statistical significance percentage is displayed; winner declared when >95%

title: Revenue tracking report
steps:
1. Open campaign with revenue goal
2. View revenue report
expectedResult: Revenue per visitor and total revenue are shown per variation

title: Segmented report view
steps:
1. Open report
2. Apply segment filter (device, location, browser)
expectedResult: Report shows metrics broken down by the selected segment

title: Schedule automated report emails
steps:
1. Open report
2. Click Schedule Report
3. Set recipients and frequency
4. Save
expectedResult: Automated report emails are scheduled and sent at the configured frequency

title: Invite new team member
steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Team
2. Click Invite
3. Enter email
4. Assign role
5. Send invite
expectedResult: Invitation email is sent; user appears in pending invites list

title: Assign Admin role to user
preconditions: Admin is logged in; team member exists
steps:
1. Navigate to Team management
2. Select user
3. Change role to Admin
4. Save
expectedResult: User role is updated to Admin with full permissions

title: Assign Viewer role restrictions
steps:
1. Navigate to Team management
2. Select user
3. Set role to Viewer
4. Save
expectedResult: User can only view data; create/edit/delete actions are disabled

title: Remove team member
preconditions: Admin is logged in; member exists
steps:
1. Navigate to Team management
2. Select user
3. Click Remove
4. Confirm
expectedResult: User is removed from the account; access is revoked immediately

title: View audit trail of user actions
steps: 1. Navigate to Settings > Audit Log
expectedResult: Audit log shows timestamped entries of all user actions (login, changes, etc.)

title: Edit own profile information
steps:
1. Click profile avatar
2. Edit name/email/photo
3. Save
expectedResult: Profile information is updated successfully

title: Change account password
steps:
1. Navigate to Profile > Security
2. Enter current password
3. Enter new password
4. Confirm and Save
expectedResult: Password is updated; user can login with new password

title: Access control for restricted modules
preconditions: Viewer role user is logged in
steps:
1. Login as Viewer role
2. Try to access Campaign Creation
3. Try to modify settings
expectedResult: Access denied message shown; restricted actions are blocked

title: Connect Google Analytics integration
steps:
1. Navigate to Integrations
2. Select Google Analytics
3. Enter tracking ID
4. Authenticate
5. Save
expectedResult: Google Analytics integration is connected and data sync begins

title: Configure webhook notification
steps:
1. Navigate to Integrations
2. Click Webhooks
3. Add webhook URL
4. Select trigger events
5. Save
expectedResult: Webhook is configured; notifications fire on selected events

title: Disconnect an integration
steps:
1. Navigate to Integrations
2. Select active integration
3. Click Disconnect
4. Confirm
expectedResult: Integration is disconnected; data sync stops

title: Configure account-level settings
steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Account
2. Update account name, timezone
3. Save
expectedResult: Account settings are updated and reflected across the platform

title: Set up custom domain for tracking
steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Tracking
2. Add custom domain
3. Verify DNS configuration
expectedResult: Custom domain is verified and tracking uses the custom domain

title: API key generation
steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > API
2. Click Generate New Key
3. Copy API key
expectedResult: New API key is generated and displayed; can be used for API calls

title: Revoke API key
steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > API
2. Select API key
3. Click Revoke
4. Confirm
expectedResult: API key is revoked; requests using it return 401 Unauthorized

title: SMTP email configuration
steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Email
2. Configure SMTP server details
3. Send test email
4. Save
expectedResult: SMTP settings are saved; test email is received successfully

title: View current subscription plan
steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Billing
2. View current plan
expectedResult: Current plan details are displayed: plan name, features, renewal date

title: Upgrade subscription plan
preconditions: User is on a lower-tier plan
steps:
1. Navigate to Billing
2. Click Upgrade
3. Select higher plan
4. Enter payment details
5. Confirm
expectedResult: Plan is upgraded; new features are immediately available

title: Downgrade subscription plan
preconditions: User is on a higher-tier plan
steps:
1. Navigate to Billing
2. Click Change Plan
3. Select lower plan
4. Confirm
expectedResult: Plan is downgraded at end of current billing cycle; features adjusted

title: Update payment method
steps:
1. Navigate to Billing
2. Click Payment Methods
3. Add new card
4. Set as default
5. Save
expectedResult: Payment method is updated; next billing uses the new card

title: View billing history
steps: 1. Navigate to Billing > History
expectedResult: Billing history shows all past invoices with dates, amounts, and status

title: Download invoice
steps:
1. Navigate to Billing > History
2. Click Download on an invoice
expectedResult: Invoice is downloaded as a PDF with all billing details

title: Cancel subscription
steps:
1. Navigate to Billing
2. Click Cancel Subscription
3. Provide cancellation reason
4. Confirm
expectedResult: Subscription is marked for cancellation at end of billing period

title: Free trial expiration handling
preconditions: User is on a free trial
steps:
1. Allow trial period to expire
2. Attempt to login
expectedResult: User sees trial expired message with options to upgrade or contact sales
